source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The outputs of four systems \( (S_1, S_2, S_3, S_4) \) corresponding to the input signal \( \sin(t) \), for all time \( t \), are shown in the <image>. Based on the given information, which of the four systems is/are definitely NOT LTI (linear and time-invariant)?

registry_passed=true, with no registry issues reported
